name: Cheng Li
bio: Professor at the University of Science and Technology of China. Parallel and distributed intelligent computing and storage systems are his main research fields, with a data-centric perspective.

name: Youhui Bai
bio: Associate Professor at the School of Computer Science, University of Science and Technology of China. Research focuses on distributed LLM training and inference systems, algorithm–system co-design for large models, and scalable graph neural network computing frameworks, aiming to improve system performance and usability.
